workflow.name: Enrich event registrations with HubSpot, Clearbit, LinkedIn and Gemini AI
workflow.description:
# **Event Registration + Auto-Enrichment Intelligence**

**Who is this for?**  
Event organizers, conference planners, and marketing teams fighting registration drop-off who want **4-field forms** with LinkedIn-level attendee intelligence.

***

**What problem is this workflow solving?**  
Multi-page forms kill conversions:  
- 80-90% drop-off on page 2  
- No attendee insights post-reg  
- Manual enrichment wastes hours  
- Abandoned carts = lost revenue  

This captures **4 fields** but enriches **15+ data points** automatically.

***

**What this workflow does**  

**3 Webhook Intelligence Suite**:  
- **POST /event-registration**: 4-field form → enrichment → HubSpot  
- **POST /reg-beacon**: Abandoned cart tracking pixel  
- **POST /validate-promo**: AJAX promo code validation  

**Requires 2 sub-workflows**:  
1) [**Abandoned Cart Recovery**](https://www.linkedin.com/in/milobravo/) 
2) [**Participant Re-engager**](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)  



**Enrichment Waterfall**:  
Clearbit → LinkedIn (Proxycurl) → Google+AI → Full profile  

**Outputs**:  
- HubSpot contacts with company/role/title  
- Data Tables: enriched_profiles / reg_analytics  
- Slack alerts + email confirmations  

***

**Setup (12 minutes)**  

- **Data Tables**: enriched_profiles, reg_analytics, promo_codes  
- **HubSpot**: API key + custom properties  
- **APIs**: Clearbit, Proxycurl, SerpAPI, Gemini  
- **Host**: reg-page/index.html (update webhook URLs)  
- **SMTP/Slack**: Notifications  

Fully configurable, no code changes needed.

***

**How to customize to your needs**  

- **Forms**: Swap HTML for Typeform/Webflow  
- **Enrichment**: Add Apollo/Hunter for emails  
- **CRM**: HubSpot → Salesforce → Airtable  
- **Promos**: Tiered discounts / early-bird  
- **Companion**: Abandoned Cart + Re-engager templates  

***

**ROI**:  

- **3x registration completion** (4 fields vs 12+)  
- **65% enriched profiles** (company/role/title)  
- **20% revenue recovery** (abandoned carts)  

***

**Need help customizing?**:  
Contact me for consulting and support: [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/milobravo/) / [Message](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)  

***

**Keywords**: event registration, attendee enrichment, abandoned cart recovery, conference automation, HubSpot

workflow.name: Event Registration with Auto-Enrichment Intelligence TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
## Event Registration + Auto-Enrichment 

### **What it does:**
Complete event registration intelligence in a single workflow:
1. **One-page registration** — 4 fields, instant confirmation
2. **Auto-enrichment waterfall** — Clearbit → LinkedIn → Google+AI
3. **Promo code validation** — AJAX endpoint for discount codes
4. **HubSpot CRM** — contacts auto-created with enriched data
5. **Abandoned cart beacon** — tracks form opens for recovery

### **Why it matters:**
65% of event planners see flat/declining registrations. Multi-page forms cause 80-90% drop-off. This captures just 4 fields while enriching 15+ data points post-registration.

### **Three webhook paths:**
- `POST /event-registration` — main registration
- `POST /reg-beacon` — abandoned cart tracking
- `POST /validate-promo` — promo code validation

### **Setup steps:**
1. Create Data Tables: `enriched_profiles`, `reg_analytics`, `promo_codes`
2. Create HubSpot credential + custom properties
3. Add API credentials: Clearbit, Proxycurl, SerpAPI
4. Connect Google Gemini, Slack OAuth2, Email (SMTP)
5. Update all `PLACEHOLDER_*` values
6. Host `reg-page/index.html` and update webhook URLs

### **Companion templates:**
- **Abandoned Cart Recovery** — follow-up emails
- **Alumni Re-engager** — AI-personalized outreach

## 1. Abandoned Cart Beacon

The HTML page fires a `form_started` beacon on page load. This creates a `started` record. If the user submits, it updates to `confirmed`. If they don't submit within 1h → abandoned cart sequence triggers (separate template).

## 2. Validate & Create HubSpot Contact

Server-side validation (required fields, email format) → **HubSpot upsert** (create if new, update if email exists).

Sets `lifecycle_stage=lead`, `lead_status=NEW`. Maps: `email`, `firstname`, `lastname`, `company`, `promo_code`, `event_registration`.

Responds immediately with success — **no user-facing latency**. Enrichment runs async after the response.

## 3. Enrichment Waterfall (Async)

Runs AFTER the webhook has responded. Waterfall stops early when enough data is found — saves API costs.

**Step 1:** Cache check (skip if recently enriched with score ≥50) → **Step 2:** Clearbit/Apollo (person + company from email) → **Step 3:** Proxycurl LinkedIn (profile resolution) → **Step 4:** Google Search + Gemini AI (last resort)

**Score → Cache → Merge** back into registration data. Expected cost: ~$0.08/registrant with cache hits.

## 4. Notify & Log

After enrichment merges back:
- **Confirmation email** with event details
- **Slack notification** with enriched data
- **Promo code credit** (if applicable)
- **Analytics log** for reporting

## ⚠️ Error Handling

All non-critical nodes in this workflow use `continueOnFail`:
- **HubSpot** unreachable → registration still responds to user
- **Enrichment APIs** fail → registration confirmed, enrichment skipped
- **Email/Slack** fail → other notifications still send
- **Analytics** fail → user experience unaffected

The webhook responds BEFORE enrichment starts — users never wait.

## Was this helpful? Get in touch!

[![clic](https://vptkuqoipqbebipqjnqw.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/Milo%20Bravo/seeAxWUupcOOXY5tntexZ_video.gif)](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)

I really hope this automation helped you. Your feedback is incredibly valuable and helps me create better resources for business and the n8n community.

### **Have Feedback, a Question, or a Project Idea?**

I've streamlined the way we connect. It all starts with one simple form that takes less than 10 seconds. After that, you'll chat with my AI assistant who will gather the key details and pass them directly on to me.

####  **[Start the conversation here](https://tally.so/r/EkKGgB)**

*   **Give Feedback:** Share your thoughts on this template—whether you found a typo, encountered an unexpected error, have a suggestion, or just want to say thanks!

*   **n8n Consulting:** Have a complex business challenge or need a custom workflow built from scratch? Let's partner on a powerful automation solution tailored to your specific needs.

*   **Join your team:** We can work together to get you launched with confidence.

---

Happy Automating!
[Milo Bravo](https://linkedin.com/in/MiloBravo/) | BRaiA Labs | Automation & BI Systems + AI Integration

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ $('Initialize Enrichment State').item.json.first_name }} {{ $('Initialize Enrichment State').item.json.last_name }} {{ $('Initialize Enrichment State').item.json.company }}

parameters.content:
## ⚠️ API Cost Management

Waterfall stops early when "good enough":
- **Clearbit**: ~$0.05-0.10/lookup (highest ROI)
- **Proxycurl**: ~$0.01/credit (only if Clearbit has gaps)
- **SerpAPI + Gemini**: ~$0.005 combined (last resort)

Cache prevents re-enriching. Average: **~$0.08/registrant**.

nodes.name: Log Promo Code to Data Table

parameters.content:
## 5. Promo Code Validation (Separate Webhook)

AJAX endpoint (`POST /validate-promo`) called by the HTML registration page. Validates codes against a Data Table: checks expiry date, usage limits, active status. Returns JSON with discount percentage and validity.

main.node: Log Promo Code to Data Table

user.name: Milo Bravo

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
